hooks.command: node -e "const p = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH || ''; const noisy = ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock','pnpm-lock.yaml','.next/','node_modules/','dist/','build/','.turbo/','coverage/','*.map'].some(x => p.includes(x)); if (noisy) { console.error('BLOCKED (token-saver): Reading ' + p + ' would flood context. Use Grep/Glob to extract specific values instead.'); process.exit(2); }"

node -e "const cmd = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND || ''; const blocklist = ['npm install','yarn install','pnpm install','npm ci','git log --all','git log -p','cat package-lock','cat yarn.lock','find . -name','ls -la node_modules','npm list','pip freeze']; const hit = blocklist.find(b => cmd.includes(b)); if (hit) { console.error('BLOCKED (token-saver): \"' + hit + '\" returns massive output. Use a targeted alternative (Glob/Grep/specific flags).'); process.exit(2); }"

node -e "const result = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT || ''; const lines = result.split('
'); const LIMIT = 200; if (lines.length > LIMIT) { const truncated = lines.slice(0, LIMIT).join('
'); const dropped = lines.length - LIMIT; process.stdout.write('[token-saver] Output truncated: showing first ' + LIMIT + ' of ' + lines.length + ' lines (' + dropped + ' lines dropped). Use Grep/Read for targeted extraction if needed.
'); }"

hooks.prompt: Before compacting: identify and exclude from the summary any tool results that are: (1) raw file dumps of lock files, build output, or node_modules; (2) identical or near-identical repeated tool calls; (3) error stack traces already resolved; (4) large Bash outputs no longer referenced. Preserve: current task state, key decisions, file paths edited, outstanding TODOs, and any unresolved errors. If this is an EcodiaOS session, additionally preserve: which systems were touched, which specs were read, any cross-system integration surfaces discovered, any architectural decisions made, and whether the doc contract has been fulfilled. Output a compact summary prioritising active work over historical noise.
